list.orderTitle: Paṣẹ Awọn Iforukọsilẹ Oju Opo Wẹẹbu

view.title: Wo Oju Opo Wẹẹbu {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ tun fi imeeli kaabọ ranṣẹ?
view.emailSentMessage: Imeeli kaabọ ti tun ranṣẹ. Ṣayẹwo apamọwọ rẹ.

buyIp.title: Ra Afikun IP Afikun
buyIp.existingAddonIps: Awọn IP Afikun Ti o wa Tẹlẹ
buyIp.costDescription: Idiyele ({symbol}) gbogbo oṣu bi oju opo wẹẹbu rẹ ti isan
buyIp.confirmMessage: Idiyele IP Afikun: {symbol}{cost}/oṣu. Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ paṣẹ IP afikun?

migration.title: Gbe Oju Opo Wẹẹbu Rẹ
migration.registeredUsername: Orukọ Olumulo / Imeeli / ID Ti Forukọsilẹ
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Ti aaye naa ba jẹ aaye laaye/ti o ni ijabọ giga, ṣe a le ṣeto oju-iwe idaduro lakoko gbigbe?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Ṣe aaye yii ni awọn ibeere pataki bii Ẹya PHP / Awọn Modulu?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Ṣe o fẹ ki a tun ṣe iranlọwọ gbigbe iforukọsilẹ orukọ agbegbe?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Ṣe o fẹ ki a ṣe imudojuiwọn awọn sarvari orukọ ni kete ti a ba pari gbigbe data?
migration.note1: Kikun fọọmu yii yoo ṣii tikiti tuntun fun ẹka atilẹyin wa lati bẹrẹ gbigbe rẹ.
migration.note2: Jọwọ jẹ pipe ati deede bi o ti ṣee ṣe lati yago fun awọn idaduro.
migration.note3: Gbigbe aṣoju kan pari laarin wakati 48 si 72. Nigba miiran gun sii ti iye data lati daakọ ba tobi.
migration.note4: Akọọlẹ gbalejo atijọ nilo lati wa lori ayelujara ati ki o wọle lakoko ti a n ṣe gbigbe, bibẹẹkọ a le dojukọ iṣoro.
migration.note5: Jọwọ maṣe ṣe awọn imudojuiwọn lori aaye rẹ lakoko ti a n ṣe gbigbe, bibẹẹkọ awọn data wọnyi le ma daakọ si gbalejo tuntun.
